zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk Strange於大約1267年出生在英國史洛普爾隆諾時，他的父親Sir Robert le Strange37歲，母親Alianore de Blancminster38歲。他於1296年與Eleanor Giffard在英國史洛普爾其其結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1300年住在法國加斯可。他於1322年在法國阿奎泰被列為seneschal。他去世於1324年1月23日在英國賀福爾布拉可麥享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾布拉可麥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulk Strange于大约1267年出生在英国史洛普爾隆諾时，他的父亲Sir Robert le Strange37岁，母亲Alianore de Blancminster38岁。他于1296年与Eleanor Giffard在英国史洛普爾其其结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1300年住在法国加斯可。他于1322年在法国阿奎泰被列为seneschal。他去世于1324年1月23日在英国賀福爾布拉可麥享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾布拉可麥。

nameMeanings.name: Strange
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Gloucestershire): nickname for a newcomer to a district, from Middle English strange ‘foreign’ (Old French estrange, Latin extraneus, from extra ‘outside’).

Irish (Antrim): this name is also common in Ireland, where, in addition to its English etymology, it may represent an Anglicized form of any of several Irish names containing the element gall ‘stranger’, e.g. Doyle , Gallagher .

variants.name: Stranger
meanings: English: nickname for a newcomer to an area, from Middle English stra(u)nger(e) ‘stranger, foreigner’ (Old French estrangier). Compare Strange .

variants.name: Doyle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Sean, Kieran, Seamus, Aileen, Dermot, Liam, Niall, Brennan, Brigid, Conal, Conan, Donal.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhghaill ‘descendant of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was used as a byname for Scandinavians, in particular to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDougall , McDowell .

variants.name: Lestrange
meanings: Irish and English: variant of Strange 1 with fused Old French definite article le.

Irish: in Ireland, adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche ‘son of Cúchoigcriche’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the borderland’. Lestrange was adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche probably due to the presence of a prominent family of Lestrange, of similar meaning, who settled in the counties of Westmeath and Offaly in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk Strange was born about 1267, in Longnor, Shropshire, England, his father, Sir Robert le Strange, was 37 and his mother, Alianore de Blancminster, was 38. He married Eleanor Giffard in 1296, in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Gascogne, France in 1300. In 1322, at the age of 56, his occupation is listed as seneschal in Aquitaine, France. He died on 23 January 1324, in Blakemere, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Blakemere, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk Strange est né environ 1267, à Longnor, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert le Strange, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alianore de Blancminster, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Giffard en 1296, à Whitchurch, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Gascogne, France en 1300. En 1322, à l’âge de 56 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est seneschal à Aquitaine, France. Il est décédé le 23 janvier 1324, à Blakemere, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Blakemere, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fulk Strange um 1267 in Longnor, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert le Strange 37 und seine Mutter Alianore de Blancminster 38. Er hat 1296 in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England Eleanor Giffard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1300 hat er in Gascogne, Frankreich gelebt. 1322, als er 56 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als seneschal in Aquitaine, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. Januar 1324 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Blakemere, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Blakemere, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk Strange è nato il circa 1267 nel Longnor, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert le Strange, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Alianore de Blancminster, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Giffard nel 1296, nel Whitchurch, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Gascogne, Francia nel 1300. Nel 1322, all'età di 56 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come seneschal nel Aquitaine, Francia. Morì il 23 gennaio 1324, nel Blakemere, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulk Strangeが約1267年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアロングノーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert le Strangeは37歳，母Alianore de Blancminsterは38歳であった。1296年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィトチャーチでEleanor Giffardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1300年にはフランスガスコグンに住んでいた。1322年，56歳の時，フランスアクイティアインでの職業はseneschalと記録されている。彼は1324年1月23日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブラケメアで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブラケメアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Fulk Strange(이)가 대략 1267년 영국 슈럽실르 론뇰르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert le Strange(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Alianore de Blancminster(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1296년 영국 슈럽실르 휘트c후르치에서 Eleanor Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1300년도에 프랑스 가스코그니에서 살았다. 1322년, 56세의 나이로 그의 직업은 프랑스 아키테인에서 seneschal이었다. 그는 1324년 1월 23일 영국 허퍼드실르 블레이케머에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 블레이케머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk Strange nasceu aproximadamente 1267, em Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert le Strange, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alianore de Blancminster, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Giffard em 1296, em Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Gascogne, França em 1300. Em 1322, com 56 anos, sua profissão aparece como seneschal em Aquitaine, França. Ele faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1324, em Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk Strange родился около 1267 г. в местности лонгнор, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert le Strange было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alianore de Blancminster, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Giffard в 1296 г. в местности уичурч, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности гаскогн, Франция в 1300 году. В 1322 году, в возрасте 56 лет,  он работал по профессии seneschal в местности аквитеин, Франция. Он умер 23 января 1324 г. в местности блеикемир, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности блеикемир, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.from 1309 to 1314: mai le 1309 e o'o I le 1314

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fulk Strange nació aproximadamente 1267, en Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert le Strange, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alianore de Blancminster, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Eleanor Giffard en 1296, en Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Gascogne, Francia en 1300. En 1322, a la edad de 56 años, su ocupación registrada era seneschal en Aquitaine, Francia. Murió el 23 de enero de 1324, en Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
